ground_truths: The consolidated total revenue from operations in FY2023 stood at ₹2,40,000 Crore.
The net profit for the year FY2023 was ₹45,000 Crore.
Key risk categories include geopolitical tensions in Eastern Europe and APAC markets, regulatory changes in Europe, and currency fluctuations between USD and INR.
The operating profit (EBITDA) was ₹74,000 Crore on revenue of ₹2,40,000 Crore, resulting in an EBITDA margin of 30.83%.
Dividend declared was ₹10.00 per equity share in FY2023.
The earnings per share (EPS) in FY2023 was ₹150.00.
Net cash flow from operating activities in FY2023 was ₹55,000 Crore.
The long-term borrowings (debt) stood at ₹18,000 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Revenue from the Cloud Services segment was ₹1,10,000 Crore in FY2023.
The total employee strength was 45,200 as of March 31, 2023.
The employee turnover rate in FY2023 was 12.5%.
The company's target Return on Equity (ROE) for the medium term is 20.0% to 22.0%.
The consolidated total revenue from operations in FY2022 was ₹2,10,000 Crore.

Total operating expenses in FY2023 were ₹1,80,000 Crore (comprising ₹1,66,000 Crore operating expenses excluding D&A, plus ₹10,000 Crore depreciation and amortization, plus interest expense of ₹4,000 Crore).
Operating profit (EBITDA) in FY2023 was ₹74,000 Crore.
EBITDA in FY2022 was ₹48,000 Crore.
Depreciation and amortization (D&A) expense in FY2023 was ₹10,000 Crore.
Depreciation and amortization expense in FY2022 was ₹8,000 Crore.
Earnings Before Interest and Tax (EBIT) was ₹64,000 Crore in FY2023.
Interest expense in FY2023 was ₹4,000 Crore.
Interest expense in FY2022 was ₹5,000 Crore.
Profit Before Tax (PBT) in FY2023 was ₹60,000 Crore.
Profit Before Tax (PBT) in FY2022 was ₹35,000 Crore.
The tax rate applied in FY2023 was 25.0%.
Tax expense in FY2023 was ₹15,000 Crore.
Tax expense in FY2022 was ₹8,750 Crore.
Net profit for the year (PAT) in FY2022 was ₹26,250 Crore.
Earnings per Share (EPS) in FY2022 was ₹87.50.
Net profit margin for FY2023 was 18.75%.
Net profit margin in FY2022 was 12.5%.
Total assets reached ₹1,95,000 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Non-current assets were ₹1,20,000 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Non-current assets were ₹1,05,000 Crore as of March 31, 2022.
Current assets were ₹75,000 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Current assets were ₹65,000 Crore as of March 31, 2022.
Cash and cash equivalents was ₹12,500 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Cash and cash equivalents was ₹7,500 Crore as of March 31, 2022.
Paid-up share capital was ₹3,000 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Other equity (reserves and surplus) was ₹1,07,000 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Total shareholders' equity was ₹1,10,000 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Total shareholders' equity was ₹95,000 Crore as of March 31, 2022.
Long-term borrowings (debt) stood at ₹20,000 Crore as of March 31, 2022.
Total research and development (R&D) capitalized stood at ₹8,500 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Capital expenditure (capex) in FY2023 was ₹15,000 Crore (reported as net cash used in investing activities of -₹15,000 Crore).
Repayment of borrowings in FY2023 was ₹12,000 Crore (reported as cash flow outflow of -₹12,000 Crore).
Dividends paid in FY2023 were ₹10,000 Crore.
The statutory auditors are B.K. Ram & Co. LLP.
The statutory audit fee in FY2023 was ₹4.5 Crore.
Fees paid to the auditor for non-audit tax advisory services stood at ₹1.2 Crore.
Outstanding advances provided to the wholly-owned subsidiary, FinDoc Cloud Inc. (USA) for working capital stood at ₹5,000 Crore as of March 31, 2023.
Lease liabilities recognized as of March 31, 2023 stood at ₹3,200 Crore.
Lease liabilities stood at ₹2,800 Crore as of March 31, 2022.
Interest expense on lease liabilities was ₹280 Crore in FY2023.
Tax disputes pending with appellate authorities total ₹1,500 Crore, classified as contingent liabilities.
Revenue from the Cyber Security segment was ₹80,000 Crore in FY2023.
Revenue from the Consulting segment was ₹50,000 Crore in FY2023.
Segment profit for Cloud Services was ₹32,000 Crore in FY2023.
Segment profit for Cyber Security was ₹26,000 Crore in FY2023.
Segment profit for Consulting was ₹16,000 Crore in FY2023.
North America revenue was ₹1,24,800 Crore, contributing 52% of total revenue.
Europe revenue was ₹67,200 Crore, contributing 28% of total revenue.
Asia-Pacific revenue was ₹48,000 Crore, contributing 20% of total revenue.
The Audit Committee is composed of 4 independent directors, chaired by Mr. S. Srinivasan.
The audit committee met 6 times during FY2023.
There were no defaults on loan repayments or interest payments reported during the financial year.
Return on Equity (ROE) was 40.91% (derived from Net Profit of ₹45,000 Crore and Shareholders' Equity of ₹1,10,000 Crore).
